summary: "Hardened" in this package means something specific and different from RC1 and Execution_Archive: it is the package whose unique contribution is the room-design dossier pair — a Signature Room Architecture document and a UI/UX Tool-and-Engine Specification — that fill the gap between vNext world-design and actual implementation.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines), so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
